No Poverty.reason: The course content focuses purely on Spanish language proficiency for exam preparation, with no mention of economic resources, social protection, or poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course content is entirely focused on language acquisition and exam preparation, with no connection to food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course includes 'cuerpo y salud' (body and health) as a weekly topic, which, while primarily for language practice, provides a minimal, indirect link to promoting health awareness and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a university-level elective ('tertiary education,' Target 4.3) designed to develop practical language skills and global mobility abilities, directly aligning with increasing relevant skills for employment and decent jobs (Target 4.4).
